name: locus-memory
description: Persistent project-aware memory for Codex via Locus MCP and skill packaging.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory and Codex recall for local projects.
interface.longDescription: Bundles the Locus Codex skill and MCP server configuration for repo-local Codex onboarding without replacing the documented manual MCP path.
